title: FOXP2+ Chief Cells and CXCL14+ Fibroblasts Drive Fibrotic Remodeling in Carotid Body Tumors.
snippet: Carotid body tumors (CBTs) exhibit pronounced clinical heterogeneity, particularly in fibrotic progression, yet the underlying cellular mechanisms remain poorly defined. Here, we performed single-cell RNA sequencing on 64,944 cells from three fibrotic CBT (FCBT) and three non-fibrotic CBT (nFCBT) specimens to construct a high-resolution cellular atlas of CB...
